title: Hexavalent Belief State
description: A belief with a six-valued truth assignment: True, Probable, Unknown, Doubtful, False, or Contradictory. Extends tetravalent logic with evidential gradient values P (probable) and D (doubtful).

proposition.description: The claim or belief being evaluated

truth_value.description: T=True (verified), P=Probable (leans true), U=Unknown (no evidence), D=Doubtful (leans false), F=False (refuted), C=Contradictory (conflicting evidence)

confidence.description: Confidence in the truth value assignment (0=no confidence, 1=certain)

evaluated_by.description: Agent or persona that evaluated this belief
